summary: Server-First Calendar Architecture verification COMPLETE. Backend API returns 24 blocked dates with meta info. Frontend correctly loads blocked dates, shows skeleton loading, disables blocked dates in calendar, and enables submit only when valid dates selected.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: API correctly excludes check_out date from blocked dates (allowing back-to-back bookings)
getDatesInRange function correctly handles inclusive/exclusive end dates based on booking vs calendar_blocks
BookingDateRangePicker component properly shows skeleton loading while isLoading=true
hasBlockedDateInRange utility function properly checks for conflicts in date ranges
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server-First availability API fully verified. API returns sorted ISO date array with meta info including sources (calendarBlocks, bookings counts). Calendar correctly shows 24 blocked dates as disabled. Submit button properly disabled until valid dates selected and no date conflicts.

availability_api_returns_sorted_iso_date.evidence: API returns array like ['2026-04-01', '2026-04-02', ...] sorted alphabetically

api_includes_pending_confirmed_paid_book.evidence: API queries with .in('status', ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PAID']) - verified in code

skeleton_loading_while_fetching.evidence: BookingDateRangePicker shows CalendarSkeleton component when isLoading=true

calendar_disables_blocked_dates.evidence: Days 1-4, 15-16, 20-24 detected as disabled in April calendar via JS evaluation

range_selection_keeps_drawer_open.evidence: Calendar/popover stays open after first date selection (data-state='open' visible)

submit_disabled_until_valid_dates.evidence: Button shows 'Select dates' and is_disabled=true until both dates selected without conflicts

submit_enabled_after_valid_selection.evidence: After selecting March 15-17, button shows 'Submit Request (฿73,500)' and is_disabled=false

real_time_availability_check.evidence: Code at /app/app/listings/[id]/page.js lines 470-486 calls availability API before submitting

price_breakdown_displayed.evidence: Price Breakdown shows: Rental (2 nights) ฿70,000, Service fee (5%) ฿3,500, Total ฿73,500

console_output_highlights: Submit button enabled after valid dates: True
